TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == babelbel == ť£õś©ü makababelbel 1.śź≠ť£õś©ü makababelbel kita tayza i Taypak. siwkay nu babaungen babelbel sa , u zuma a kamu nu Sakizaya sa , u hikuki. u hikuki sa, namakay Lipun a kami. mabahel i tapukuay a kikay, mahiza ku ayam. sisakubat, caay pisaungay a sakubat. kalamkam ku babelbel, besuc sa katukuh tu patusukan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika An airplane or aeroplane is a powered, fixed-wing aircraft that is propelled forward by thrustfrom a jet engine or propeller. Airplanes come in a variety of sizes, shapes, and wing configurations. The broad spectrum of uses for airplanes includes recreation, transportation of goods and people, military, and research. Commercial aviation is a massive industry involving the flying of tens of thousands of passengers daily on airliners. Most airplanes are flown by a pilot on board the aircraft, but some are designed to be remotely or computer-controlled.
S.PHON: == bab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ == ** makabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ *.*** makabab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ kita tajza i tajpak. siwkaj nu babauŇč…ôn bab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ sa , u zuma a kamu nu sakizaja sa , u ńßikuki. u ńßikuki sa, namakaj r~…ĺipun a kami. mabańß…ôr~…ĺ i tapukuaj a kikaj, mańßiza ku ajam. sisakubat, ¶aaj pisauŇčaj a sakubat. kar~…ĺamkam ku bab…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺ, b…ôsu ¶ sa katukuńß tu patusukan. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika an airpr~…ĺan…ô or a…ôropr~…ĺan…ô is a pow…ôr…ôd, fi*…ôd-wiŇč air ¶raft tńßat is prop…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd forward bj tńßrustfrom a j…ôt …ôŇčin…ô or prop…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôr. airpr~…ĺan…ôs ¶om…ô in a *ari…ôtj of siz…ôs, sńßap…ôs, and wiŇč ¶onfigurations. tńß…ô broad sp…ô ¶trum of us…ôs for airpr~…ĺan…ôs in ¶r~…ĺud…ôs r…ô ¶r…ôation, transportation of goods and p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô, mir~…ĺitarj, and r…ôs…ôar ¶ńß. ¶omm…ôr ¶iar~…ĺ a*iation is a massi*…ô industrj in*or~…ĺ*iŇč tńß…ô fr~…ĺjiŇč of t…ôns of tńßousands of pass…ôŇč…ôrs dair~…ĺj on airr~…ĺin…ôrs. most airpr~…ĺan…ôs ar…ô fr~…ĺown bj a pir~…ĺot on board tńß…ô air ¶raft, but som…ô ar…ô d…ôsign…ôd to b…ô r…ômot…ôr~…ĺj or ¶omput…ôr- ¶ontror~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd.
S.FORM: == babelbel == ť£õś©ü makababelbel 1.śź≠ť£õś©ü makababelbel kita tayza i Taypak. siwkay nu babaungen babelbel sa , u zuma a kamu nu Sakizaya sa , u hikuki. u hikuki sa, namakay Lipun a kami. mabahel i tapukuay a kikay, mahiza ku ayam. sisakubat, caay pisaungay a sakubat. kalamkam ku babelbel, besuc sa katukuh tu patusukan. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika An airplane or aeroplane is a powered, fixed-wing aircraft that is propelled forward by thrustfrom a jet engine or propeller. Airplanes come in a variety of sizes, shapes, and wing configurations. The broad spectrum of uses for airplanes includes recreation, transportation of goods and people, military, and research. Commercial aviation is a massive industry involving the flying of tens of thousands of passengers daily on airliners. Most airplanes are flown by a pilot on board the aircraft, but some are designed to be remotely or computer-controlled.
